parts.text:
<system-reminder># System Information

Operating System: linux
Default Shell: 
Home Directory: /home/user
Current Working Directory: /home/user/repo
Current Time: Thu Mar 19 2026 11:14:53 GMT+0000 (Coordinated Universal Time)

# Current Working Directory (/home/user/repo) Files
.jj
src
src/config.py

# GIT STATUS
Current branch: HEAD
Main branch (you will usually use this for PRs): 

Status:
UU src/config.py

Recent commits:
5a475cf branch-a: update database config
34c74f8 base: initial config

# TODOs
No TODOs yet, if you are working on tasks that would benefit from a todo list please use the todoWrite tool to create one.</system-reminder>

The repository at `/home/user/repo` has a merge commit `merge-ab` that merges two branches (`branch-a` and `branch-b`) which both modified `src/config.py` from a common base. The merge has conflicts.

Resolve all conflicts in `src/config.py` keeping the database settings (host, port, name, max connections) from `branch-a` and the logging/timeout settings (LOG\_LEVEL, TIMEOUT) from `branch-b`. Mark the resolution complete so no conflicts remain. Write a conflict resolution summary to `/home/user/resolution_summary.md`.

todos.content: Inspect conflicted src/config.py and determine desired merged values from conflict markers
Resolve conflicts in src/config.py keeping branch-a database settings and branch-b logging/timeout settings
Write conflict resolution summary to /home/user/resolution_summary.md
Verify src/config.py has no remaining conflict markers and conflicts are resolved

output.content:
# Configuration file
<<<<<<< conflict 1 of 1
+++++++ vnurpkvp 5a475cf8 "branch-a: update database config"
DATABASE_HOST = "db.production.example.com"
DATABASE_PORT = 5433
DATABASE_NAME = "mydb_prod"
LOG_LEVEL = "INFO"
MAX_CONNECTIONS = 50
TIMEOUT = 30
%%%%%%% diff from: mrssznll 34c74f8e "base: initial config"
\\\\\\\        to: yvywpyqy 226243e5 "branch-b: update logging and timeout"
 DATABASE_HOST = "localhost"
 DATABASE_PORT = 5432
 DATABASE_NAME = "mydb"
-LOG_LEVEL = "INFO"
+LOG_LEVEL = "DEBUG"
 MAX_CONNECTIONS = 10
-TIMEOUT = 30
+TIMEOUT = 60
>>>>>>> conflict 1 of 1 ends

todos.content: Inspect conflicted src/config.py and determine desired merged values from conflict markers
Resolve conflicts in src/config.py keeping branch-a database settings and branch-b logging/timeout settings
Write conflict resolution summary to /home/user/resolution_summary.md
Verify src/config.py has no remaining conflict markers and conflicts are resolved

LOG_LEVEL = "DEBUG"

todos.content: Inspect conflicted src/config.py and determine desired merged values from conflict markers
Resolve conflicts in src/config.py keeping branch-a database settings and branch-b logging/timeout settings
Write conflict resolution summary to /home/user/resolution_summary.md
Verify src/config.py has no remaining conflict markers and conflicts are resolved

input.content:
# Conflict Resolution Summary

Resolved merge conflicts in `src/config.py` by combining the requested settings from each branch.

## Kept from `branch-a`
- `DATABASE_HOST = "db.production.example.com"`
- `DATABASE_PORT = 5433`
- `DATABASE_NAME = "mydb_prod"`
- `MAX_CONNECTIONS = 50`

## Kept from `branch-b`
- `LOG_LEVEL = "DEBUG"`
- `TIMEOUT = 60`

## Final result
The file now contains production database settings from `branch-a` and logging/timeout settings from `branch-b`, with all conflict markers removed.

todos.content: Inspect conflicted src/config.py and determine desired merged values from conflict markers
Resolve conflicts in src/config.py keeping branch-a database settings and branch-b logging/timeout settings
Write conflict resolution summary to /home/user/resolution_summary.md
Verify src/config.py has no remaining conflict markers and conflicts are resolved

input.result:
Resolved the merge conflict in `src/config.py` and staged the resolution so no conflicts remain.

Final `src/config.py` values:
- `DATABASE_HOST = "db.production.example.com"`
- `DATABASE_PORT = 5433`
- `DATABASE_NAME = "mydb_prod"`
- `LOG_LEVEL = "DEBUG"`
- `MAX_CONNECTIONS = 50`
- `TIMEOUT = 60`

Wrote the conflict resolution summary to `/home/user/resolution_summary.md`.
